channel.description: NFS DIY Labs Lab: Configure NFS Share and Automount with Direct Map As user1 with sudo on server30, share directory /sharenfs (create it) in read/write mode using NFS. [root@server30 /]# mkdir /sharenfs [root@server30 /]# chmod 777 /sharenfs [root@server30 /]# vim /etc/exports # Add -> /sharenfs server40(rw) [root@server30 /]# dnf -y install nfs-utils [root@server30 /]# firewall-cmd --permanent --add-service nfs [root@server30 /]# firewall-cmd --reload success [root@server30 /]# systemctl --now enable nfs-server [root@server30 /]# exportfs -av exporting server40.
